description: in-flight 达 maxConcurrent → 必须 Kafka assignment.pause(partitions),防消息堆积内存爆;in-flight 释放后 resume(capacity-aware backpressure)

then.sdkExpectedAction: before processing more: call kafkaConsumer.pause(assignedPartitions); message stays uncommitted; when one in-flight completes (inFlight drops to 3) → call kafkaConsumer.resume(assignedPartitions); Kafka redelivers the queued message
sdkMustNot: accept the message and exceed maxConcurrent
block Kafka poll thread (must return quickly or pause)
